MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Joe Vickstein. Daniel Bornstein, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Van Ness Management, LLC and there being no appearance by Defendant, Adam Castro, the matter is taken off settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
